description: Move authentication from middleware to service layer loses request context
diff_summary: Moved authentication from @require_auth decorator middleware to inline AuthService call in each route

edge_cases: Routes that forgot to add the inline auth check now have no authentication — any new route added will silently have no auth unless developer remembers to add it manually
ground_truth.broken_pattern: Decorator pattern enforced auth at the framework level; inline auth relies on developer discipline — easier to miss; g.current_user pattern removed means any code reading g.current_user elsewhere breaks
ground_truth.next_prompt: New routes we're adding don't seem to require authentication — did we break the auth middleware?
ground_truth.notes: Moving auth from declarative (decorator) to imperative (inline) reduces security by default
